case_title: NELSON W JEONG VS. GEERTZ PRINTING CO.INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEONG, NELSON W AS TO DEFENDANT GEERTZ PRINTING CO.INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
